subcodes.first_line: All the divines and mystics waited to see upon which day amongst all days the new Sun would arise and the ocean of knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع علما و عرفا منتظر که در چه یومی از ایام آفتاب جدید طالع شود و بحر علم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @development of capacity and readiness
